entities.name: PLANT GENOMES
entities.description: The complete set of genetic material in plants

entities.name: ARACHIS
entities.description: The genus of plants including groundnuts and their wild relatives

entities.name: COMPARATIVE ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of comparing genome assemblies to identify genetic variations

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Cultivated tetraploid species Arachis hypogaea L.

entities.name: ARACHIS DURANENSIS
entities.description: Diploid progenitor species of groundnut contributing the A subgenome

entities.name: ARACHIS IPAENSIS
entities.description: Diploid progenitor species of groundnut contributing the B subgenome

entities.name: PHYLOGENETIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis used to group accessions based on genotyping data and genome affinity

entities.name: GENOTYPING DATA
entities.description: Data used for phylogenetic analysis of polymorphic markers

entities.name: POLYMORPHIC MARKERS
entities.description: Genetic markers that vary among individuals, used for grouping accessions

entities.name: ARACHIS ACCESSIONS
entities.description: Diverse samples of the Arachis genus used for phylogenetic grouping

entities.name: K GENOME
entities.description: A genome distinct from A and B genomes but more similar to the B genome

entities.name: A GENOME
entities.description: The genome contributed by Arachis duranensis

entities.name: B GENOME
entities.description: The genome contributed by Arachis ipaënsis

entities.name: ARACHIS MONTICOLA
entities.description: A species showing complete homology with Arachis hypogaea tetraploid taxa

entities.name: GENOME COMPOSITION
entities.description: The makeup and structure of the genetic material within a species

entities.name: PHYLOGENETIC RELATIONSHIP
entities.description: The evolutionary relationship among accessions, genomes, sub species, and sections

entities.name: BREEDING APPLICATIONS
entities.description: The use of genetic markers for crop improvement
